session_summary: Generated planning tasks.yaml for barcode validation story following librarian queries. Created 5 tasks covering AC1-AC3, including discovery and QA tasks.
librarian_exploration_summaries_received: OpenViking lesson retrieval rate-limited; no pre-existing lessons found
Found nx/cypress DoD guidance in repo skills
decisions_made: Use 5 broad tasks: discovery, validation implementation, UI wiring, success-flow, QA
Include Cypress component tests in any task that modifies Angular components
Default to synchronous per-keystroke validation scoped to local component state

execution_blockers.blocker: OpenViking rate-limit prevented retrieval of stored lessons
execution_blockers.resolution: Included discovery task to re-run lesson lookup when possible; applied intake constraints as mandatory prevention rules.
